channel.title: Crypto on Dmitrii Korchagin
channel.description: Recent content in Crypto on Dmitrii Korchagin

item.title: Crypto introduction
item.description:
Crypto infrastructure onboarding works better as a practical reading path than as a theory dump. The useful split is:

  • exchange mechanics: what a DEX changes compared with a centralized exchange;
  • network shape: how The Open Network architecture organizes the TON system;
  • implementation exercise: building a toy chain from a guide such as Write your own blockchain.

The implementation exercise is not about production code. It is a quick way to make the vocabulary concrete:
